channel.title: Music-List on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Music-List on smpaget blog

item.title: Audio Charactor - since august
item.description: following on from the post on the 9th of august, the new things I have mostly been listening to are as follows; Amanda Palmer - Who Killed Amanda Palmer Anathallo - Floating world & Canopy Glow Ani DiFranco - Red Letter Year apollo 440 - Best trips Bela Bartok - Concerto for Orchestra & Music for Strings, Percussion and Celesta Belle and Sebastian - The BBC Sessions Ben Folds - Way To Be Normal & I Made It Up On Stage Black Rebel Motorcycle Club - The Effects Of 333 British Sea Power - Do You like Rock Music Burial - Unture casiotone for the painfully alone - Town Topic EP David Byrne and Brian Eno - Eyerthing That Happens Will Happen Today De La Soul - 3 Feet High and Rising Elvis Costello - The Very Best of Elvis Costello Emiliana Torrini - Me and Armini Eminem - Various Albums - Greatest hits Eric Copeland - Hemraphrodite Faust & Nurse With Wound - Disconnected Fleet Foxes - Fleet Foxes Flobots - Flight With Tools Fredrik - Na Na Ni Friendly Fires - Friendly Fires Fucked Up - The Chemsitry of Common Life George Frideric Handel - various Glasvegas - Glasvegas Guns’N’Roses - Various albums - Greatest Hits Hello Saferide -Introducing & More Modern Short stories from Hello Saferide I’m From Barcelona - Who Killed Harry Houdini James Yorkston - When the Haar Rolls In Janet Jackson - All For You Jenny Lewis - Acid Tongue Johann Sebastian Bach - various Kate York - Sadlylove Kevin Max - The Blood Kristofer Åström - Loupita Lambchop - OH (io) Les Savy Fav - Lets Stay Friends Like Honey - Leaves Lykke Li - Youth Novels Margot & The Nuclear So And So’s - Not So Animal Mc Hammer - various Mercury Rev - Strange Attractor Miss Li - God put a rainbow in the Sky & Late Night Heartbroken Blues & Songs of a Ragdoll Moby - Moby, Everything Is Wrong & Last Night Neko Case - Blacklisted & Eurnace Room Lullaby Nick Cave And The Bad Seeds - Dig, Lazarus, Dig! Noah & The Whale - Noah and The Whale P!nk- Funhouse Pas_Cal - I Was Raised On Matthew, Mark, Luke & Laura Pepi Ginsberg - Red Peter Bjorn & John - Writers Block Podcasts - Seasame Street Video podcast! Portico Quartet - Knee-Deep In The North Sea Ray LaMontagne - Gossip in The Grain & Till The Sun Turns Black & Trouble Rosie Thomas - If Songs Could Be Held & These Friend of Mine Roxette - Various Albums - Greatest Hits Sandra McCracken - Gravity-Love Seabear - The Ghost That Carried Us Away Sixpence None The Richer - My Dear Machine EP Sly & the Family Stone - Stand! Snowglobe - Our Land Brains Sonseed - First Fruit Tegan And Sara - The Con The Decemberists - Always the Bridesmaid 1 The Disciplines - Smoking Kills The Hood - Mixtape 3 The Juliana Theory - Emotion is Dead The Last Shadow Puppets - The Age of Understatement The National - Live from Oya Festival, Norway The Raconteurs - Consolers Of The Lonely The Smiths - The Sound of the Smiths The Traveling Wilburys - Collection Thievery Corporation - Radio Retaliation TV on the Radio - Dear Science Two Gallants - Two Gallants United Bible Studies The Shore That Fears The Sea Vashti Bunyan - Just Another Diamond Day Voice Of The Seven Woods - Voice Of The Seven Woods Was (Not Was) - What Up Dog Waterdeep - Heart Attack Time Machine Woven Hand - Ten Stones Wu-Tang Clan - Enter the Wu Tang Clan - 36th CApter Xiu Xiu - Xiu Xiu YMCK - Family Genesis ZZ Top - Eliminator

item.title: ...Listening to this stuff.
item.description:
These are most of the albums I have been listening to since i last blogged about music
1 Giant Leap 1 Giant Leap
Aimee Mann - Smilers
Alphabeat - This Is Alphabeat
Anathallo - Floating World
Architecture In Helsinki - Like It Or Not
Azure Ray - Azure Ray
Bear Vs. Shark - TerrorHawk
Beck - Modern Guilt
Black Kids - Partie Traumatic
British Sea Power - Do you Like Rock Music
Candy Chang - Detroit Detroit
Clap Your Hands Say Yeah - Some Loud Thunder
Cold War Kids - Loyalty To Loyalty
Coldplay - Viva La Vida
CSS - Donkey
Death Cab For Cutie - Narrow Stairs
Doveman - Footloose (covers album)
Elbow - The Seldom Seen Kid
Elvis Costello - The Very Best of Elvis Costello
Flight of the Conchords - Flights of The Conchords
Foo Fighters - Echoes, Silence & Grace
Guillemots - Red
Jim Schoenfeld - Schony
King Curtis - Live At Filmore West
Kings Of Leon - Crawl
Kings Of Leon - Because Of The Times
Ladytron - Velocifero
Martha Wainwright - I Know You’re Married
Michael Andrews - Donnie Darko OST
Michael Quint - Michael Quint In Concert
My Morning Jacket - Evil Urges
The National - Liberation CD
Nirvana - In Utero
Over the Rhine - 2008-04-26 Canal Street Tavern (Bootleg)
Pete rodriguez - I Like It Like That
Peter Bjorn & John - Writer’s Block
Primal Scream - Beautiful Future
R.E.M. - Accelerate
Robert Plant & Alison Kruass - Raisin Sand
Ron Sexsmith - Exit Strategy Of The Soul
Saturday Looks Good To Me - Sound on Sound
She and Him - Volume One
Sigur Rós - með suð í eyrum við spilum endalaust
Sly And The Family Stone - Stand!
Soko - Not Sokute
Someone Still Loves You Boris Yeltsin - Perishing
Sons and Daughters - This Gift
Sun Kil Moon - April
The Black Keys - Attack And Release
The Hold Steady - Stay Positive
The Wombats - A Guide to Love, Loss & Desperation
Toby Mac - Portable Sounds
Tom Waits - Live in Akron (Bootleg)
Xiu Xiu - Women As Lovers
Guardian Glastonbury mp3 Album
Now 70
Tsururadio Best of the Year So Far (mp3 blog various album)
Urban Outfitters - LSTN #1 (Mp3 album) plus various mp3’s from
Beirut, Belle & Sebastian, Belle Stars, Bright Eyes, Chris Starling, Cassettes Won’t Listen, Colin Meloy, Compilations, Daft Punk, Daft Punk vs Bangers & Cash, Damien Jurado, Dean Manning, Fantastic Idea Project, Francis International Airport, Frightened Rabbit, Giorgio Moroder, Hall and Oates, Holidays On Ice, Ida Marie, Jeppe, John Mellencamp, Kermit the Frog, Kuryakin, Lambchop, Lisa Germano, Little Dragon, M.I.A., Matmos, Micah P Hinson And The Red Empire Orchestra, Mikkel Glasser, Nick Cave And The Bad Seeds, Will Smith, Oneida, Parenthetical Girls, Pas_Cal, Jill Sobule, Muse, Portishead, Muse & The Streets, Richard Hawley, Rosie Thomas, Simone White, Team 9 mashups, Tape, Telephathic Boy, The Apples In Stereo, The Dixie Cups, The Dresden Dolls, The Explorers Club, The Social Services, The Ting Tings, The Watson Twins, Tricky, We Are Scientists, Brazilian Girls and Katie Perry who kissed a girl and apparently liked it so much she wrote a song about it! I should really blog about music more. Technorati Tags - music list & new music

item.title: ponoka - a dutch band
item.description:
After my love affair with At The Close Of Every Day, whose excellent album The Silja Symphony is still one of my top 10 listens, ever. And obviously my pleasurable addiction to I’m From Barcelona, and various swedish detours including Hello Saferide I have recently found a new dutch band to become excited about Ponoka
Okay I haven’t heard much of their music. but what i have heard i like quite alot. The band are a indie rock band from, Utrecht, with a male/female singing group and a number of good songs. They claim Lemmonheads, Sparklehorse, Eels and Pavement as influences. (I must get that eels best of album.) They are signed to Volkoren the dutch independant label. Their latest album is called Hindsight and in english. The whole thing is being streamed live on Last.fm it sounds quite pleasent. but the joy is perhaps more lavish on their Youtube channel. where they have some songs from the album and a new one, the exquisite Disconnected. The band just strike me as a really cool band who have a good sound that could one day conquer the world! anyway check them out technorati Tags - ponoka & volkoren

item.title: rating the Album of the Year
item.description:
various magazines have decided to anounce their top music albums of the year.
I like to go through the list, count how many albums i have on each list to see how in tune i am with each magazine. Q magazine top 50 list Klaxons - Myths of the Near Future
The National - Boxer
The Decemberists - The Crane Wife
Beirut - The Flying Club Cup
Spoon - Ga Ga Ga Ga Ga
Bright Eyes - Cassadaga
Björk - Volta
LCD Soundsystem - Sound of Silver
Rilo Kiley - Under the Blacklight
Modest Mouse - We Were Dead Before the Ship Even Sank
Rufus Wainwright - Release the Stars
Radiohead - In Rainbows
The White Stripes - Icky Thump
Arcade Fire - Neon Bible Paste magazine top 100 list (minus those above) Stars – In Our Bedroom After The War
The Fiery Furnaces - Widow City
Devendra Banhart - Smokey Rolls Down Thunder Canyon
Do Make Say Think - You, You’re A History In Rust
The New Pornographers - Challengers
Okkervil River - The Stage Names
St. Vincent - Marry Me
Apples In Stereo - New Magnetic Wonder
The Broken West - I Can’t Go On I’ll Go On
Andrew Bird - Armchair Apocrypha
Of Montreal - Hissing Fauna, Are You The Destroyer?
Over The Rhine - The Trumpet Child
Black Lips - Good Bad Not Evil
Josh Ritter - The Historical Conquests of Josh Ritter
Amy Winehouse - Back to Black
Iron & Wine - The Shepherd’s Dog
Band of Horses - Cease to Begin uncut magazine top 50 list (minus those above) Maps - We Can Create
Steve Earle - Washington Square Serenade
Feist - The Reminder
Super Furry Animals - Hey Venus!
Battles - Mirrored
LCD Soundsystem - Sound of Silver having all this music does make me question if i have actually heard it all.
I currently am most in tune with paste magazine. but they are the only ones so far to have Over the rhine in the top 100 so no doubt they would be my favourites. The other issue is how to list or rate all this music.
do you go for a simple top 10
or top 50 I am toying with the idea of using the system used at the International Mathematical Olympiad, and awarding albums nothing, bronze, silver or Gold awards.
but unsure about the critera for this type of marking system. Any thoughts? Technorati Tags -
end of year list, rating system & music
